---
name: Bug report
about: A validator false positive/negative, a broken link, or incorrect guidance
title: "fix: <short description>"
labels: bug
---

**What's wrong:** <e.g. validator flags valid code / rule cites outdated spec / dead link>

**Where:** <file path + rule ID or validator name>

**Expected:** <what should happen>

**Actual:** <what happens — paste validator output if relevant>

**Repro (if a validator issue):**
```
python3 quality-checks/validators/<validator>.py <path>
```
